title: Building a Simple UI
description: Combine widgets to create a profile card.

slides.title: Profile Card Project 📇
slides.content:
# Let's Build a Profile Card

We'll combine multiple widgets to create a simple profile card with:

* Profile picture
* Name and title
* Stats (posts, followers, following)
* A follow button

quizData.question: Which layout widget would you use to arrange children vertically?

slides.title: Profile Card Code
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Extract reusable widgets

Break your UI into smaller widgets (like `_buildStat`) to keep code organized and reusable.
